title: Meander Morphology Classifier: Curvature-Spectral Meander Bend Classification and Compound-Bend Latent-Space Workflow
description: Python research-software toolkit and Streamlit graphical user interface for curvature-based meander bend classification. The software supports inflection-point single-bend extraction, continuous wavelet-transform spectrum generation, compound/complex-bend segmentation from curvature spectral energy, and latent-space inference using separately archived trained model files.
